expectations.text: GET /api/tasks returns a JSON list of tasks
POST /api/tasks creates a new task and returns 201
expectations.evidence: POST test created task with id a2041fd1-4d0b-4d11-8341-7bf32796c5a5 and returned 201 Created

expectations.text: DELETE /api/tasks/<id> removes a task and returns 204
expectations.evidence: DELETE test returned 204 No Content, subsequent GET confirmed task was removed

expectations.text: The API handles JSON request bodies correctly
expectations.evidence: POST with JSON body {"title": "Buy groceries"} correctly parsed and stored

expectations.text: The app is running in a sandbox with a public URL
